entry.title: Re: Date range input control - SAC optimized Story
entry.content:
Hello @Deb_D,

It works the same for me in classic and optimized design mode. I don't get a slider using the time filter options in the bottom of an input control (like in your screenshot). But I get one selecting the time dimension I want to use (e.g. Calendar Day):

Best regards

Lothar

entry.title: Finding B1 UI Field Labels for Database Fields Without Tedious Mapping
entry.content:
I need to map the SAP Business One database fields to their corresponding labels as they appear in the B1 client UI. For instance, in the Sales Quotation form, the field OQUT.CardCode is labeled as Customer in the UI.

I know I can use View > System Information to see this information, but with the number of fields across various tables, this approach feels a bit... overwhelming.

Is there a reference, document, or method to retrieve all these mappings in a more efficient way?

entry.title: Re: SAP Build work zone, SAPUI5 app, controller not execu...
entry.content:
We further analyzed the issue and found that when the app is executing in WorkZone, 2 component-preload.js files are loading (inspected the app). One file has proper data and other one has incomplete data.

In order to overcome this, we did 2 settings.

1. ui5-deply.yaml : added below section under builder

  componentPreload:
    excludes:
      - "testworkzone/controller/**"
 
2. change package.json build script
    "build": "ui5 build --config=ui5.yaml -a --clean-dest",
 
With these 2 settings, the app worked perfectly.
 
PS: I am using trial account , US East(VA).

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA ATP BATCH LEVEL
entry.content: I am not sure how you derive vbbe inconsistency from having zero quantity in co09. This is not related, especially if you state you basically have stock. It would of course help to share screenshot of the situation and scope of check. For further analysis perhaps even from Stock/requirements view (md04). Sharing all information in the question would increase the likelihood of getting things solved :).

entry.title: Re: Crystal reports 2020 : The document could not be opened
entry.content: This definitely is a issue with Patch 8. I open a report in 2020 did verify database and then proceeded to make changes and do a final save and it gave the same error when trying to open again. Looks like will need to rollback to an earlier patch version

entry.title: Special Procurement MRP Area to MRP Area
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is it possible to create a special procurement type of Stock transfer from MRP Area to MRP area? I try to find that type in OMD9, but only find the "Stock transfer from plant to MRP area" (Sp.pr. Type = 45)

Can we possibly customize the procurement type so that it also sent from a specific MRP Area?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build work zone, SAPUI5 app, controller not execu...
entry.content: Do let us know if you find an alternate work around for this.

entry.title: Re: IBP Format sheet - Can we do directly in IBP Producti...
entry.content: Hi Andrei_Lupu, Thanks and appreciate your suggestion/comments. The planning view Template names in IBP Production system and IBP Quality system are different. 1 ) The planning view Templates names are used in Alert Monitoring definitions, user can select Planning View Template name and the respective Planning View Template will be opened to check the incorrect data which is causing Alert. So the option of "Test in IBP Quality/Test system having Test Planning Area and disconnect from IBP Quality/Test system -> connect to IBP Prod system -> save template which was kept open and connect to IBP PROD system and save the Planning View Template into IBP Prod system" could create issues or problem. 2 ) What issues/problems we get if we do change/update the Formatting of Cells in IBP Formatting Sheet directly in IBP Production system ? Thanks. Parthi

entry.title: Re: Hybrid Scenario: Usage of SAP HANA Calculation View on SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Armaan,

did you create a Synonyme in your Business Application Studio to access Datasphere View as data source for your Calculation View? After that you have to grant SELECT privilege, so the application user has the authority to execute "SELECT" on this Synonyme. Please reffers to Step 10 and 11 in my article above.

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: How can I auto close the MM & FI Period in SAP Hana 1...
entry.content: Transaction MMPV runs the RMMMPERI report. You need to schedule the report as a periodic background job.

entry.title: Re: Partial Leave Cancellation in SuccessFactors
entry.content: Hi, there are 2 options. One is to cancel the 5 day request and create 2 day request, the other option is to change existing 5 day request to 2 days request. If you have configured workflow to be triggered for cancellation as well as update, the workflow will be triggered or the new/updated request.

entry.title: Auto cash discount the discount will be calculated on Daily Basis
entry.content: Auto cash discount working for payment to be done earlier before due date for vendor payment. The discount will be calculated on per day basis at fixed %.

entry.title: Auto cash discount the discount will be calculated on Daily Basis
entry.content: Auto cash discount working for payment to be done earlier before due date for vendor payment. The discount will be calculated on per day basis at fixed %.

entry.title: Re: Need some clarification or suggestions regarding T-Co...
entry.content: Report RMMD07NEW is available in ECC. However is not associated with any transaction. You can create a custom T-code to run the report.

Hi everyone,

could any one please help me how we can extract the data and show the insights in process intelligence.

entry.title: Re: SAC LIVE BW enable Option Default Values "Keep last s...
entry.content:
Hello Lothar,

Thanks for your reply. Yes this is true but I need this option to save the values for a particular chart or table only. If I set it on "Bookmark-Level" its kind of global setting and all tables and chart are affected.

Best regards,

Zoran

entry.title: How to mass upload the materials (demand) in project from excel for one wbs in manage project demand
Re: Automating Multi-Sheet Excel Report Creation and Emailing in SAP ABAP
entry.content:
@Sandra_Rossi 

Thanks for the input! You're absolutely right — if you already have an XSTRING variable like excel_as_xstring, you can directly use the TRANSFER statement to write the file in one go without converting it to an internal table. The conversion is often unnecessary and can lead to confusion about the requirement for an internal table.

 

" Open the dataset in binary mode
OPEN DATASET lv_path FOR OUTPUT IN BINARY MODE.
IF sy-subrc = 0.
  TRANSFER excel_as_string TO lv_path.      " Directly write the XSTRING in one step
  CLOSE DATASET lv_path.
  WRITE: / 'File successfully written to AL11: ', lv_path.
ELSE.
  WRITE: / 'Error opening file in AL11: ', lv_path.
ENDIF.

entry.title: Eclipse - Where-Used functionality for ABAP CDS views not working
entry.content:
Hi all,

I want to get the know the all usage of a CDS View. In the subsequent screenshot, I try to get the "where-used-list" of CDS View I_MaterialDocumentRecord. I get only 5 hits in the result whereas my colleague gets more than 200.

I have already tried the following points:

  • Calling "where-used" from project editor, outline, code editor and the menu button. All results in the same behavior.
  • Activated business function "SRIS_CODE_SEARCH" as suggested by the eclipse config guide.
  • Ran the code-search and this also doesn't show related CDS views
  • Downloaded a different Eclipse-Version 2409 with no change
  • Checked authorization object s_adt_res and a * star is assigned to me

To me it looks like that the object types are filtered, as I can see only access controls and package interfaces. But I don't find any setting, where I would be able to change this.

As I'm really stuck, any help is highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: ENCRYPTED E-MAIL ATTACHMENT PDF
entry.content: I wonder why we still don't have any functions in SAP for PDF encryption. Here is also another alternative for PDF encryption using PDFTK software.

entry.title: Re: Date range input control - SAC optimized Story
entry.content: Hello @Lothar_Köder, thank you for your answer! My concern is that I tried to create a "YTD current year" and "YTD previous year" in the same slider (as it worked for me in the classic story). I'm afraid that the "calendar day" won't give me this flexibility.

entry.title: Re: Applying the pipeline concept for a point-to-point integration scenario
entry.content:
@aravindkumar_srinivasan the JMS queue prefix is not meant for defining sender specific queues, the idea is that you setup multiple pipelines if required, this way you can distribute different scenarios to different pipelines, to do so you need to copy the whole package, configure and then deploy the generic flows with the new prefix. If you copy the package you need to copy from the Discovery area, then you can add a suffix to the package which is then also added to all flows, this way you ensure that all copied packages are not cut off from updates.

However, the idea of the pipeline concept is to share a set of JMS queues across multiple scenarios in order to reduce the number of required JMS queues to a minimum. If you define an own JMS queue for each sender, then you end up with too many queues again, actually I don't see any sense in doing so, instead I would recommend to use the same pipeline for multiple senders.

Alex

entry.title: Re: Update ACDOCP table from ABAP options
entry.content:
Dear @LiyaAjayan,

https://api.sap.com/api/API_FINPLANNINGDATA_SRV/overview is the right way to update data in table ACDOCP.

You might want to also have a look into our SAP Help portal - Financial Plan Data - Write.

Please let me know if this answers your question.

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Re: IAS/IPS: UPN in Azure and UserName in Cloud Apps
entry.content:
{ "sourcePath": "$.userPrincipalName", "targetPath": "$.loginName", "correlationAttribute": true },

To Build Transformation between Source & Target Systems

JSON Path will save your time and make you better to build.. Paste your JSON payload from source system and identify the path to update in your Transformation to Target Systems fields. Kindly refer the below blog which will speed your build.

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/understanding-of-sap-ips-transformation-logic-to-map-source-amp-target/ba-p/13549783
  • https://jsonpath.com

    https://github.com/yogananda-muthaiah/SAP-Sucessfactors-Incentive-Management/tree/main/Integrations/IPS

entry.title: Re: Issue with Automatic Cancellation of Purchase Invoice in Intercompany Billing
entry.content:
Hi,

The sales and purchasing processes are independent,

so the cancellation of the sales invoice will naturally not trigger the cancellation of the purchase invoice.

Mathias

entry.title: Truncate table and mass upload with CAP
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I want to replicate a table with CAP. The entire table is to be “copied” with each run. This means that I first have to delete all entries from the target table and then write all rows from the source table to the target table.

If I do this with the standard CRUD operations, it takes quite a long time (there are approx. 165000 rows in the table).

Is there a possibility to do a “TRUNCATE” on the DB table and then a “mass upload”?

Many thanks and best regards
Heinrich

entry.title: Copy Purchase Requisition(PR) price to Purchase Order(PO)
entry.content:
In SAP Materials Management (MM), handling material prices from Purchase Requisition (PR) to Purchase Order (PO) is crucial for maintaining accurate procurement costs. This process can vary based on different scenarios and configurations. Let's explore how material prices are managed and delve into specific test cases.

When a Purchase Requisition (PR) is created, it may include a suggested price for the material. This price can be derived from various sources such as the material master, purchasing info records, or manual entry. When converting a PR to a Purchase Order (PO), the system determines the final price based on predefined rules and configurations.

Test case 1: Adopt PR price to PO

Pre-Requisite configuration

SPRO > IMG > Material Management > Purchasing > Authorization Management > Define Functional
Authorization for Buyers > Function Authorization: Purchase Order.

Create a parameter and activate "Adopt PO Price"

Assign the parameter value to the parameter EFB in Transaction SU01 under parameters tab.

Material Price

Create a PR 

In valuation tab you can update PO price as "As Gross Price"

(you can make this option as default setting by chosing personal setting)

Create a PO by refering PR

Material price for: 50 SAR 1 EA

Net value in PO: 100 SAR for 2 EA (Price adopted from Material > PR > PO)

Test case 2: Material Line Item Added Directly in PO

When a material line item is added directly in the PO, the system will fetch the price from the purchasing info record.

Expected Outcome: The price in the PO should reflect the price from the purchasing info record.

Test Case 3: Preventing Price Copy from PR to PO

In some cases, you might not want the price from the PR to be copied to the PO. This can be achieved by adjusting the variant parameters or selecting the "Do not apply" option in the PR item details.

Expected Outcome: The price in the PO should be derived from the purchasing info record or manually, not the PR.

 

By following the outlined test cases, you can ensure that the correct prices are applied in different scenarios, maintaining accuracy and consistency in your procurement process.

entry.title: Re: Flexible workflow: Recipients cannot be edited (The r...
entry.content:
Hi Javo,

Recipients in workitem can be modified or recalculated (SWIA or from the Fiori app Flexible Workflow administration), the recipient for work item notifications can't be easily modified.

 

Regards

 

JCD

The only solution will be restricted measure and calculated measure for variance. I know its not ideal but I am not sure when we will have table level calculation working as dynamic.

Nikhil

entry.title: SAP Product Inspiration Series for Industries & Intelligent CX (Wave #6)
entry.content:
Hi everyone, toward the end of the year I'm totally excited to announce the 6th Wave of our Product Inspiration Series in which we dive into latest innovations across Intelligent CX from SAP, in conjunction with SAP S/4HANA, BTP, Business AI and industry-tailored scenarios. Please check out our latest episodes below.

 

1. Digital Selling Workspace in SAP Sales Cloud V2 in Action

Punav Prabhudesai from the Sales Cloud Product Management at SAP provides an overview on the new Digital Selling Workspace. Watch this product inspiration video to learn about the functional capabilities of this user-centric workspace in SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 as well as our major innovations as part of the Intelligent CX portfolio from SAP.

The key highlights shared in this video are:
00:00 - Introduction
00:55 - Why Digital Selling Workspace in SAP Sales Cloud Version 2?
02:24 - What Are the Key Innovations in Digital Selling Workspace?
03:60 - How Can Customers Adopt the Digital Selling Workspace?
04:42 - Start of the Demo
05:01 - Demo: Digital Selling Workspace Overview
05:42 - Demo: Call Lists and Call Scripts
07:24 - Demo: Log a Call and Create Follow-Up Activities
09:31 - Demo: Manage Leads and Activities Effectively
11:57 - Demo: Manage Opportunities and Activities Effectively
14:43 - Demo: Manage Email Activities Effectively
15:30 - Demo: Adaptation Mode for Digital Selling Workspace
17:24 - Summary: Intelligent CX from SAP

 

2. SAP Commerce Cloud in Action

Marcus Schreiner from the Commerce Cloud Product Leadership Team at SAP provides an overview on SAP Commerce Cloud. Watch this product inspiration video to learn more about the latest innovations as well as the strategic direction for Composable Commerce as part of the Intelligent CX portfolio from SAP.

The key highlights shared in this video are:
00:00 - Introduction
00:58 - Why SAP Commerce Cloud?
02:06 - Which Scenarios does SAP Commerce Cloud offer?
03:38 - How can Customer Adopt SAP Commerce Cloud?
04:15 - Start of the Demo
08:52 - Summary: Intelligent CX from SAP

 

The following videos are still in process - but should be available in the coming weeks:

  • Quiq AI for SAP Intelligent CX
  • Extensibility of SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 using NCLC Tools
  • Extensibility of SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 with SAP BTP by using the example of ORBIS TEM
  • SAP Predictive Planning and Inventory Orchestration 
  • SAP Customer Checkout in Action
  • Partner Tactics in SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement

 

Curious to learn more about Intelligent CX from SAP? Then check out the other videos:  

Back to the Product Inspiration Overview  |  Wave I  |  Wave II  |  Wave III  |  Wave IV  |  Wave V

entry.title: Re: Eclipse - Where-Used functionality for ABAP CDS views not working
entry.content:
ABAP 7.58 doesn't have any business function SRIS_CODE_SEARCH and doesn't provide a where-used list between CDS views, only SAP GUI transaction SDDLAR works as shown here: https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/where-used-functionality-for-abap-cds-views/m-p/13593220/highlight/true#M2026372.

EDIT: you mean SRIS_SOURCE_SEARCH. This one exists in ABAP 7.58 and deactivated by default. Be careful, activating it makes REPOSRC table grow from 10 to 100 GB (source: 3339157 - How to deactivate business function SRIS_SOURCE_SEARCH - SAP for Me).

entry.title: Re: Issue with Automatic Cancellation of Purchase Invoice in Intercompany Billing
entry.content: hi

entry.title: API Management vs Open Connectors
entry.content:
Technology Q&A

Dear all, as a background I am working on a project where we need to consume some API's and make them available in BTP. We had a meeting with the customers and as a solution we have presented them Integration Flows and API Management. We are not having experience with Integration Flows and API Management so we are currently on a learning curve and trying to learn more about them.

While initiating the project they wanted us to configure Open Connectors(on top of Integration Flows) in order to make their APIs externally visible and be able to be commercialized. 
When I did some research we found that the best option for this purpose was the API Management on top of Integration Flows - as I understood Open Connectors might not be available anymore in the future.

Now the customer is always asking what's the difference between them Open Connectors vs API Management. Can someone please help me to differentiate API Management from Open Connectors and show the advantages/disadvantages ?

Their goal is to have their APIs exposed to a marketplace, have external visibility and in future to be able to commercialize them...Can we help them reach their goal with API Management? Is there a place where the APIs can be exposed in the same way as Open Connectors?
Thanks in advance!

Is there any other configuration should I do or not?
After run the function lo_cl_somu_form_services->get_document(), then the exception was caught.

entry.title: Re: Regex help
entry.content:
Hi @aravind_indu ,

I'm not sure if lookaheads are working, but with a Perl like syntax it is look like this:

 

^(?=.{10,18}$)[a-zA-Z]{3,10}\.[a-zA-Z]{3,10}$

Regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: Default values with abstract entity
entry.content: Hi, thank you but I am getting "Annotation 'UI.defaultValue' unknown"

entry.title: Re: Regex help
entry.content:
Using callout it is possible.

DATA lv_text TYPE string VALUE `Aravind.Induchudan is a mail id. This is great.`.
lv_text = lv_text && ` Sam.Tom is another mail id. Anirudh.Induchud is another mail`.


CLASS handle_regex DEFINITION.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    DATA lv_len TYPE i.
    INTERFACES if_abap_matcher_callout.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS handle_regex IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD if_abap_matcher_callout~callout.
    DATA lv_result TYPE if_abap_matcher_callout=>callout_result.
    IF callout_num EQ 1.
      lv_len = capture_last_len.
    ELSEIF callout_num EQ 2.
      lv_len = capture_last_len + lv_len.
      IF lv_len LT 10 OR lv_len GT 18.
        callout_result = IF_ABAP_MATCHER_CALLOUT=>c_callout_result-FAIL.
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS demo_pcre DEFINITION.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    CLASS-METHODS main.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS demo_pcre IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD main.
    DATA(regex) = cl_abap_regex=>create_pcre(
      pattern = `(\w{3,10})(?C1)(\.)(?C3)(\w{3,10})(?C2)` ).

    DATA(matcher) = regex->create_matcher( text = lv_text ).

    DATA(handler) = NEW handle_regex( ).
    matcher->set_callout( handler ).
    DATA(lv_result) = matcher->match( ).

    TRY.
        CALL METHOD matcher->find_all
          RECEIVING
            matches = DATA(lt_result).
        LOOP AT lt_result INTO DATA(ls_result).
          WRITE: /, lv_text+ls_result-offset(ls_result-length).
        ENDLOOP.
      CATCH cx_sy_matcher.
    ENDTRY.

    cl_demo_output=>display( ).
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

START-OF-SELECTION.
  demo_pcre=>main( ).

entry.title: Re: BAPI to request the stock in a storage location
entry.content: How its give material stocks i am not cleared. BAPI_GOODSMVT_GETDETAIL one is used to get material documents wise data.

entry.title: Re: Issue with Automatic Cancellation of Purchase Invoice in Intercompany Billing
entry.content: hi thank you for your comment, I understand it. If this is not the standard behavior, could you please advise on how to configure the system to automatically reverse the related purchase invoice when the sales invoice is canceled? Is it possible to use IDOC customization to automate this process?

entry.title: Re: Adding the Logo in the SAP BTP Adobe Form in S/4 publ...
entry.content:
Hi Swarup,
if you want to embed a logo to the template directly, make sure the embed image data option is checked for the image field in Adobe LiveCycle Designer for sap solutions.

If you want to embed images during runtime, create a new data field of type abap.rawstring(0) (internally represents xstring) and fill it. The reuse class for receiving xml data tree (https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/rap-data-services-for-print-forms?version=Cloud) will resolve the xstring to base64 automatically.

After this, create a binding to this data field in your image field in Adobe LiveCycle Designer.

Best regards
Pascal

entry.title: Re: Unable to activate Contract
entry.content: If those are 'warning' message, try ignore them pressing Enter?

entry.title: Re: How to connect On Premise SAP to BTP using SAP Cloud Connector
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

I'm trying to connect SAP Cloud connector (installed on my MAC - a portable version) to SAP BTP Trail version - Subaccount.I tried to add the subaccount in the cloud connector under "define sub-account". I have given the region , sub account ID , email and password. But I'm getting error when I click on Finish button

Error:

"Proxy cannot be reached"

I tried with the other sub account details and still getting the above error.

Just want to know what user should be given under "subaccount user" while adding the subaccount.

I have given the user details (with which I have created the subaccount), but still above error occurs.

Please suggest how to fix the error.

Regards,

Satish

entry.title: INVOIC02 iDod with Down Payment and BillingPlan
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

we are integrating SAP SD Billing with Peppol Network/ eInvoice 3.0. Therefore we are using INVOIC02 iDoc as basis. We have Business cases with downpayment/ billingplan and final invoices. Infact the final invoice has serious issues in integration as the 'amouts payed' is designed as separate billing item which "understands" the eInvoice Standard as own item. Besides of that eInvoice wants to have the "amounts payed" on header level which is not compatible to the billg plan design is SAP with AZWR conditiontype. 

Any ideas? Is there an extension/ functionmodue available to implement this changes in iDOc or a different messagetype?

 

Regards

Andreas

entry.title: INVOIC02 iDod with Down Payment and BillingPlan
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

we are integrating SAP SD Billing with Peppol Network/ eInvoice 3.0. Therefore we are using INVOIC02 iDoc as basis. We have Business cases with downpayment/ billingplan and final invoices. Infact the final invoice has serious issues in integration as the 'amouts payed' is designed as separate billing item which "understands" the eInvoice Standard as own item. Besides of that eInvoice wants to have the "amounts payed" on header level which is not compatible to the billg plan design is SAP with AZWR conditiontype. 

Any ideas? Is there an extension/ functionmodue available to implement this changes in iDOc or a different messagetype?

 

Regards

Andreas

entry.title: Re: Solution Order - Subscription BAdI Extensibility
entry.content: Can you please paste a more clearer image . or raise it as a separate Q and A in the community portal instead of BLOG  . As that allows us to track on the porta for queries.

entry.title: Re: Flow function: "Set repeated item value" suddenly not working
entry.content: i am returning from TechEd in UK, but I will investigate on my return … but could you use the regular set variable flow function in the meantime?

entry.title: Outgoing payment approval using Bank payment Advice in SAP Business ByDesign do not go for approval
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,
 
Please we are currently having a challenge with Outgoing payment approval using Bank payment Advice in SAP Business ByDesign
 
The challenge is that, it does not go for approval even after all setup has been done. For proper context, the below are what has been setup:
 
 Under Business Configuration we made the following setup; 
 
 1. In Payment Approval - Outgoing Payments under  task: "Business Task Management for Payment and Liquidity Management", the Payment method availabe are:
a. Bank Transfer 
b. Check is:
 
We setup company payment methods for both Bank Transfer and Check as well as the threshold amount. 
 
 Under Application and User Management - Employee Work Distribution we made the following  setup;
 
 2. "Approver for Liquidity Management" and  "Approver for Payables"
 
We set up Rule as All, parameter as company and we defined a user responsible for approval, validity is active as the Rule valid To is set to "unlimited"
 
 After the setup has been completed, on making payment on supplier invoice in the system, it  only goes for approval when "New Outgoing Bank Transfer" is used to do the transaction
But using New Bank Payment Advice it does not go for approval!
 
Please help point out any issue we may be missing out, as to why Bank Payment advice skips the payment approval workflow.

entry.title: Export multiple accesses data of a user on a course
entry.content:
Hello,

we"d like to know if it is possible to export, by using Plateau, People Analytics, API, date and time of the single accesses of a user into a course.

From an initial analysis performed, no tables were found that export each access made by a user on an online course for example.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 TB report BP display filtered by GL Accounts
entry.content:
Hello! thank you for your answer. General Ledger has only one issue. It does not display ending balance for every customer.

I have attached screenshots.

First one is selection criteria, second one is general ledger. it displays opening balance in "Cumulative Balance LC" field in light grey color. then in Debit/Credit displays turnover for selected period and ending balance is not displayed. 

Report summarizes totals for all customers, in my case, I have displayed only one customer and total of this report is correct, but in real life, customer will choose several business partners, the bottom of this page will contain all data

entry.title: Re: Inventory Revaluation with Inventory debit/credit typ...
entry.content:
The item is valuated by Standard Cost method? This is an important information, because if that is the case, you cannot change inventory value in any way other that with revaluation document of Price Change type.

What you are trying to do is add value to existing stock, but since the item is valued as standard cost, it is not allocating any value to item itsefl. And that is the reason you don't see the transaction in inventory audit report, because it didn't actually affect inventory.

From accounting perspective, this should also be obvious to you when you check journal entry of revaluation document. Usually, negative revaluation should be posted to gl decrease account / inventory account. But your journal entry is posted to gl decrease account /variance account (maybe you got confused because variance and inventory account are the same in account determination, they shouldn't be).

entry.title: Enabling Credit management check in Solution order
entry.content:
Business Problem

A professional service industry wants to have a credit check enabled for Customer Projects in S4 HANA.

But the Customer project object by default does not support the Credit check functionality .

Approach

Solution order document supports the creation of projects as part of its standard functionality.

So if a credit check can be performed on the the net value of the solution order , it would allow us to understand the credibility of the Consumer requesting for the service or products .

Solution

Implement the BADI CRMS4_SERV_CHECK_BEFORE_SAVE   to perform a credit check on solution order.

If the document type is “SOLO” , then proceed with checking the  credit details.  

Currently SAP credit management is not providing any API to get the Credit score from the  S4 system .

Hence in public cloud we will query the CDS view I_CreditManagementAccount business partner as the sold to party function .

 

Credit management required settings

Open the application maintain business partner in the change mode and in the  in BP Role  assign the role UKM000 – SAP Credit management.

In the credit profile maintain the rule : SAP All External agencies & Int Scoring and also maintain a risk class

 

Also maintain the credit segment data

 

Manage Credit account.

Maintain the limit in the credit segment

 

Implementation details

In the public cloud use the custom logic app to create a BADI implementation .

Click on open code editor to write the logic for the credit check

 

The field serviceheader-servicedocumenttype , serviceheader-soldtoparty , serviceheader-transactioncurrency provides the current document type , the business partner and creditsegmentcurrency respectively to query on the CDS view i_creditmanagementaccount.

 

 

 

Please note: Knowing the fact that service-related document currently do not send any warning message to the UI passed from a BADI implementation the message type have to be of type error.  And also the solution order will be saved in the system with an error message. Further processing for the document will be possible only when the error is resolved.

entry.title: Re: Admin Proxy in the New Learning Experience
entry.content: Hi, the linked KBA has been removed. Is this behavior connected to the issue that admins can not see the new learning experience at all when acting as proxy?

entry.title: Re: Public Dimension Table Import Job Error
entry.content: Hi, we had an issue in one hierarchy of the public dimension too. Some members were not in the hierarchy. Once we added them manually the import jobs started refreshing successfully again. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Regex help
entry.content: This regex works also with POSIX regex.

entry.title: Re: Eclipse - Where-Used functionality for ABAP CDS views not working
entry.content:
I was able to find business function SRIS_CODE_SEARCH in transaction SFW5 and could successfully activate it. After activation, the error on the object search in Eclipse disappeared. However, I got further information. A colleague working on the same system as I am faces the same issue. However, the colleague for whom it works is on S/4HANA 2023 Initial Shipment. I'll upload the screenshots in a second. Thus, I wonder what is missing for 2023 SP02. Was the functionality taken out? And yes, SDDLAR works but it is slow and not that handy.

EDIT: You are correct with the business function. Sorry for the confusion. 

EDIT 2: Screenshots from the colleague where it works

entry.title: Re: How to Consume a class as and API or Consume it as an...
entry.content: Thank you

entry.title: SAP BRIM and Partner Products like, e.g. SAP CM by DR - Product Availability Matrix?
entry.content:
SAP BRIM (former Hybris Billing Solution) 

I cannot find SAP BRIM and the related partner solutions like, e.g. SAP Converged Mediation in the official SAP PAM?

How is that possible, i mean, SAP offers two different deployment stacks (Private and Public Cloud), but there is not technical background information about which type of Cloud Provider is supported or which OS/DB/etc version is certified for certain deployment cases?

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Setting Default Values for Create in ABAP RESTful app...
entry.content: I have on-prem with managed scenario. Can I use your code snipplet?

entry.title: Re: Setting Default Values for Create in ABAP RESTful app...
entry.content: I use Visual Studio Code. Where I have to insert the code snipplet? In which file?

entry.title: Adding Long Term Backup to existing Contract - What are the options?
entry.content:
A customer has a 5 year contract starting 31-03-2022.

The customer want by 01-01-2025 to upgrade with the option: 8011088 SAP long-term backup, yearly backup with 4-year retention, private edition

Is this possible?

The 4 year option goes beyond 5 year contract end date (30-03-2027)!

So is the correct option for the request to hire the 3 year option (to include the remaining 2 year plus 3 month) or is the 2 year option the correct option?

  • 8011086 SAP long-term backup, yearly cloud backup with 2-year retention, private edition
  • 8011087 SAP long-term backup, yearly cloud backup with 3-year retention, private edition
  • 8011088 SAP long-term backup, yearly backup with 4-year retention, private edition

Thanks,

 

RISE with SAP

entry.title: How can I delete SH from on sold-to and move the same SH under a different sold-to account
entry.content: We are merging some "duplicate sold to accounts". So I will use one single sold to instead of 2 separates (we sold different brands under different accounts. I need to move some of the ship-to accounts from the dormant/ duplicate account -> to the agreed single "one". How is that possible?

entry.title: Re: How to find the history of approved or rejected form...
entry.content:
Hello,

Once you have set up and run the process. You can manually monitor the transactions/item in the Control Tower -> Monitoring -> Process/Workflows. 

This is effective on debugging stage. To do it on live/running process, you can create Process Visibility Scenarios to create performance indicators and see process variables/attributes you assigned. 

I believe this could be the correct way of doing things. 

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-create-process-visibility..html

**********************

As an option, you may create a process/automation that will notify and logged all transactions - (this is dependent on the overall architecture of your Process/Automation.

entry.title: Re: Saprouter denies https after some time
entry.content: When the -D option is not used, saprouter makes a reversed DNS check. Perhaps this contradicts with the Linux DNS cache. On the other hand reverse DNS check may not always return the same host. Probably it is better to use -D.

entry.title: Re: Introducing the new Adaptation Editor experience for SAPUI5 adaptation projects
entry.content: Hi @Summitt12 Most of them yes. There are few legacy apps which do not (yet) fulfil the prerequisites for adaptation projects. You can find out in the Fiori Apps reference library, which has a dedicated section IMPLEMENTATION INFORMATION -> Extensibility

entry.title: Re: How to find ACTVT Activity field / value in program?
entry.content:
Dear Romy, can you explain me better your requirement?

Do you wanna insert a custom authority check in a custom program? Or do you only need to check which authorization value to assign to ACTVT field in a standard program?

entry.title: Data migration sequence for Subscription Billing
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

very soon we'll start data migration for Subscription billing objects and I would like some clarifications concerning the sequence specifically for products, rate plans, rate plan templates.

When data is created manually the order is the following: create a rate plan template, create a product and during or after product creation  assign/create a rate plan with reference to a rate plan template.

Looking at the Product API, I have the impression that the rate plan cannot be created at the same time as the product as the rate plan ID should be assigned to the product, but if the rate plan is not created yet the ID is not available. 

Could you please confirm if below sequence is correct ?
Is there a more efficient strategy (ex. create product + rate plan at the same time) ?

1. Create rate plan templates
2. Create rate plan with reference to previously created rate plan template ID
3. Create Product and assign previously created rate plan ID 

Thank you very much in advance.

entry.title: Replication Cost Center from S4 Hana (S4HCM version) to Employee Central
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I got the information that cost center replication from S4 Hana is not supported without SAP MDI (Master Data Integration) in latest S4 Hana for HCM.

So I would like to know or anyone can confirm if it is not supported any longer using SAP CPI?

If possible please providing any KBAs related, because I need to communicate this matter with our client.

Regards,
Reza

entry.title: Re: Regex help
entry.content:
Thanks, interesting to see a callout example. So, PCRE (since ABAP 7.55). I guess it's more an exercise than real life code, because testing the match length is a much shorter code (3 lines of code).

More about PCRE/Callouts in ABAP: Modern Regular Expressions in ABAP - Part 1 - Intr... - SAP Community
